query:
INSERT INTO courses (code, title, description, courseType, cpdHours, displayOrder, colorTheme, totalLessons, price) VALUES
('DIV108', 'Advanced Spiritual Warfare', 'Comprehensive study of spiritual warfare principles, demonic hierarchies, and practical strategies for spiritual victory. Explores biblical foundations, armor of God, prayer warfare, and deliverance ministry.', 'theological', 10, 18, '#1e40af', 10, 89),
('DIV109', 'Kingdom Authority and Power', 'Study of kingdom authority, spiritual power, and the believer''s position in Christ. Covers delegated authority, spiritual authority over circumstances, and exercising kingdom power in ministry.', 'theological', 10, 19, '#1e40af', 10, 89),
('DIV110', 'Deliverance Ministry', 'Practical training in deliverance ministry, identifying demonic oppression, and biblical approaches to spiritual freedom. Includes case studies, theological foundations, and pastoral care considerations.', 'theological', 10, 20, '#1e40af', 10, 89);
